title: True Vanilla+
description: A modpack that provides a handcrafted experience aimed towards beginners and experienced players alike!
body:
![True Vanilla+ Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cec7429648d3adfe12a9e4bd41a6fe26c40c781d.png)

True Vanilla+ is a custom-tailored vanilla+ modpack for new and old players alike. 

It explores a possible direction that Mojang could take the game within the coming years; fleshing out/overhauling existing features, inplementing features from the latest updates and snapshots, adding all-new features, and plenty of Quality of Life changes!

Each mod has been hand-picked and configured to be a well-balanced and smooth transition from the base game into the world of modded Minecraft.

To help new players, tips on the loading screen and escape menu, as well as a help menu, have been included.

## True Vanilla+ alters all aspects of the game, including notable features like:

- Terrain generation to match the sketches for Mojang's Wild Update
- Mob vote losers
- An atlas to act as a form of minimap
- Seasons
- New fishing mechanics to make fishing more enjoyable
- New crops and foods to elevate your culinary experience
- More archeology structures and features
- Upgradable storage
- More variants of most vanilla mobs
- Realistic sound physics
- More particles to make the game feel more like the Minecraft trailers
- Realistic snow
- Plenty of new structures in all dimensions
- New Trial Chamber-esque challenges
- More uses for copper; gear, tools, redstone, etc.
- New blocks, doors, flowers, etc. to unleash your creativity!
- Ability to make your own paintings
- A few new weapon types
- Progression for bows and shields
- Dual-wielding swords
- More gear for the end game
- New enchantments
- Overhauled brewing mechanics
- A new dimension accessed via Ancient Cities; the Otherside
- Mouse tweaks
- Inventory sorting
- Plenty of Quality of Life features

and more!

See the gallery for a glimpse of what to expect in True Vanilla+.



### **Some optional, but recommended resource packs have also been included to make the game come to life like the trailers:**

- Fresh Animations
- Fresh Moves
- F.R.M.P.

**If your system can handle it, Complementary Shaders with Euphoria Patches has also been included.**

# Download Instructions

- Download and install Prism Launcher (https://prismlauncher.org/)
- Open Prism Launcher
- In the top left, click "Add Instance"
- On the left-hand side of the window that appears, click "Modrinth"
- Search for "True Vanilla+" and follow the prompts given

### Recommended 8 GB RAM dedicated to this pack
